steps.title: Use two table values
steps.content: From the table, $g(1)=32$ and $g(2)=28$. Since $g(x)=mx+b$, these give $$32=m+b$$ and $$28=2m+b.$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content: Subtract the first equation from the second: $28-32=(2m+b)-(m+b)$, so $m=-4$. Substitute into $32=m+b$: $$32=-4+b,$$ so $$b=36.$$ The question asks for the value of $b$, so Choice D — $36$.
